GL-21 Grenade Launcher

From Helldivers Wiki
Jump to navigation Jump to search

Current patch: 1.006.300

Procurement

Unlock Cost
6000 Requisition Slips
Source
Engineering Bay
“

A grenade launcher effective against armored infantry. Not intended for use against vehicle armor or fortified buildings.

— Ship Management Terminal

The Grenade Launcher is a Stratagem that calls down a Support Weapon capable of rapidly firing grenades, inflicting large amounts of splash damage.

Contents

  • 1 Procurement
  • 2 Stratagem Statistics
  • 3 Detailed Weapon Statistics
  • 4 Tactical Information
  • 5 Applicable Ship Modules
  • 6 Media
  • 7 Change History

Procurement

The Grenade Launcher is unlocked at the Patriotic Administration Center (in the Engineering Bay subsection) for 6000 Requisition Slips at Level 5.

Stratagem Statistics

General
Call-in Time Standard 7.75 seconds
Upgraded 4.75 seconds
Uses Unlimited
Cooldown Standard 480 seconds
With Morale Augmentation 456 seconds

Detailed Weapon Statistics

GL-21 GRENADE LAUNCHER
Fire Rate 160 rpm
Recoil 123.75
Horizontal Recoil 115
Vertical Recoil 132.5
Spread ↔[20.00] ↕[20.00]
Sway 1
Ergonomics 25
Capacity 10
Spare Magazines 3
Starting Magazines 2
Mags from Supply 3
Mags from Ammo Box 1
Attacks
*40mm HE GRENADE P Projectile
**40mm HE GRENADE P IE Explosion
40mm HE GRENADE P
Projectile
Mass 50 g
Initial Velocity 100 m/s
Drag Factor 120%
Gravity Factor 100%
Penetration Slowdown 25%
Explosion On Impact 40mm HE GRENADE_P_IE
Explode After 40mm HE GRENADE_P_IE
Damage
Standard  0 Ballistic
vs. Durable  0 Ballistic
Penetration
Direct  Heavy
Slight Angle  Heavy
Large Angle  Heavy
Extreme Angle  Unarmored I
Special Effects
Demolition Force 10
Stagger Force 30
Push Force 10

Area of Effect
Inner Radius 3.5 m
Outer Radius 7.5 m
Shockwave Radius 8 m
Damage
Damage Element None
Inner Radius  400 Explosion
Inner Durable  400 Explosion
Outer Radius 399 - 0
Outer Durable 399 - 0
Penetration
Direct  Medium
AoE Effect
Demolition Force 30
Stagger Force 25
Push Force 30

Tactical Information

  • Because of its ability to rapidly fire explosive projectiles, the GL-21 excels at inflicting area damage at close to medium range, decimating light or medium armored enemies and inflicting decent damage on heavily armored foes.
    • Unlike the AC-8 Autocannon, the GL-21 inflicts no direct impact damage, dealing the vast majority through their explosion. As such, they are much more effective at dealing with crowds.
    • Grenades have a pronounced arc and slow velocity which rapidly decelerates. This limits the GL-21's effective range for precision fire, though it remains potent at area suppression up to approximately 100 m.
  • The LIFT-860 Hover Pack pairs very well with the GL-21 as it allows Helldivers to improve their sightline and fire down on groups of enemies from a safer position.
  • Grenades fired from the GL-21 have a safety fuse that prevents them from exploding too soon after firing, causing them to harmlessly bounce off objects and enemies at very close range.
    • However, after ricocheting, the grenade can explode once it travels beyond this safety range and impacts the ground or nearby objects
  • Like other explosive weapons, the GL-21 can destroy Bug Holes and Automaton Fabricators by shooting into their weak points.

Applicable Ship Modules

The following Ship Modules affect the GL-21 Grenade Launcher

Department Ship Module Effect
Patriotic
Administration
Center 		Donation Access Licence Support Weapons deploy with the maximum number of carriable magazines.
Streamlined Request Process Support Weapon stratagem cooldown reduced by 10%.
Superior Packing Methodology Resupply stratagem boxes refill Support Weapons with the maximum number of carriable magazines.
Payroll Management System Reduces reload time for all support weapons by 10%.
Bridge Morale Augmentation Reduces cooldown time for all Stratagems by 5%.
Engineering
Bay 		Streamlined Launch Process All Support Weapon stratagems launch immediately once when called in, reducing overall deployment time.

Media

  • Tutorial Video Demonstrating Use of the GL-21 Grenade Launcher
  • Weapon Wheel for the GL-21 Grenade Launcher.
  • Third-Person on the GL-21 Grenade Launcher.
  • First-Person. It is the only available option.
  • Long-range holdover (aiming) guide for FPV (first-person-view)

Change History

Patch
Description

1.006.100
2026-03-17

Change

  • Reverted the change made in the previous patch - the launcher has  Medium armor penetration again

1.006.001
2026-02-03

Change

  • Increased explosion armor penetration from  Medium to  Heavy

Undocumented Changes

  • Projectile armor penetration increased from  Unarmored I to  Heavy
  • Projectile damage reduced from 20 to 0
  • Projectile durable damage reduced from 2 to 0

1.002.201
2025-03-25

Fix

  • Fixed an issue with wrong drag setting on the GL-21 Grenade Launcher projectiles that made them lose velocity faster than they should have
    • Drag factor reduced from 600% to 120%.

1.002.200
2025-03-18

Undocumented Change
Unintended Change

  • Drag factor increased from 120% to 600%.

1.001.100
2024-09-17

Changes

  • Starting spare magazines increased from 1 to 2.
  • Max spare magazines increased from 2 to 3.
  • Explosion radius slightly increased.
    • Inner Radius increased from 2.5m to 3.5m.
    • Outer Radius increased from 6.5m to 7.5m.
    • Shockwave Radius increased from 7m to 8m.

1.000.400
2024-06-13

Changes

  • Increased explosion damage from 350 to 400.

Undocumented Changes

  • Explosion Push Force reduced from 40 to 30.

1.000.300
2024-04-29

Fixes

  • Explosive weapons no longer pull players inward from the blast.
